metadata.author: George David Tsitlauri
metadata.intended_use: internal comparative sanity checks, export validation, and simulation-first attacker/defender research iteration
metadata.not_for: real-world benchmark claims, deployment-performance claims, or external leaderboard comparisons
notes: Module 2, 7, and 9 experiments are seeded synthetic detection studies.
Module 6 is a seeded co-evolutionary search calibration under a shared synthetic fitness model.
Use external datasets or cyber ranges before making public performance claims beyond this repo.

experiment_metadata.title: Module 2 Synthetic Malware Detection Calibration
experiment_metadata.scenario: Seeded binary classification simulation used to sanity-check the relative behavior of the OLYMPUS malware stack against lightweight reference detectors.

metric_notes.accuracy: Synthetic balanced classification accuracy under the seeded toy task.
metric_notes.precision: Synthetic positive predictive value under the seeded toy task.
metric_notes.recall: Synthetic malware recall under the seeded toy task.
metric_notes.f1: Synthetic harmonic mean of precision and recall under the seeded toy task.
metric_notes.fpr: Injected false-positive-rate target for the seeded toy task.

claims_supported: relative module calibration inside the current synthetic harness
directional comparison against lightweight reference detectors

summary.recommended_reading: Read the primary metric first, then inspect the raw seed-level rows before making any claims beyond synthetic calibration.

accuracy.interpretation: Synthetic balanced classification accuracy under the seeded toy task.

precision.interpretation: Synthetic positive predictive value under the seeded toy task.

recall.interpretation: Synthetic malware recall under the seeded toy task.

f1.interpretation: Synthetic harmonic mean of precision and recall under the seeded toy task.

fpr.interpretation: Injected false-positive-rate target for the seeded toy task.

experiment_metadata.title: Module 7 Social-Engineering Detection Calibration
experiment_metadata.scenario: Seeded phishing-style detection simulation used to compare the OLYMPUS social-engineering detector with simpler reference filters.

metric_notes.accuracy: Synthetic blended correctness across the seeded phishing toy task.
metric_notes.precision: Synthetic precision under the seeded phishing toy task.
metric_notes.recall: Synthetic phishing recall under the seeded phishing toy task.
metric_notes.f1: Synthetic harmonic mean of precision and recall under the seeded phishing toy task.

claims_supported: relative calibration of the social-engineering detector
repeatable synthetic comparison under shared seeds
artifact persistence for future regression tracking
not_claimed: production email-security accuracy on live traffic

summary.recommended_reading: Read the primary metric first, then inspect the raw seed-level rows before making any claims beyond synthetic calibration.

accuracy.interpretation: Synthetic blended correctness across the seeded phishing toy task.

precision.interpretation: Synthetic precision under the seeded phishing toy task.

recall.interpretation: Synthetic phishing recall under the seeded phishing toy task.

f1.interpretation: Synthetic harmonic mean of precision and recall under the seeded phishing toy task.

experiment_metadata.title: Module 9 LLM Defense Calibration
experiment_metadata.scenario: Seeded jailbreak-detection simulation used to compare the OLYMPUS LLM defense stack against lightweight filters and a null-defense anchor.

metric_notes.detection_rate: Synthetic jailbreak-detection rate under a seeded adversarial prompt set.
metric_notes.false_positive_rate: Injected false-positive-rate prior for the seeded prompt-defense task.
metric_notes.f1: Synthetic balance between jailbreak detection and overblocking.

claims_supported: internal prompt-defense calibration under seeded adversarial prompts
relative comparison between OLYMPUS and lightweight defenses
artifact persistence for attacker/defender regression studies
not_claimed: real deployment safety across public jailbreak benchmarks
production moderation behavior on user traffic

summary.recommended_reading: Read the primary metric first, then inspect the raw seed-level rows before making any claims beyond synthetic calibration.

detection_rate.interpretation: Synthetic jailbreak-detection rate under a seeded adversarial prompt set.

false_positive_rate.interpretation: Injected false-positive-rate prior for the seeded prompt-defense task.

f1.interpretation: Synthetic balance between jailbreak detection and overblocking.

experiment_metadata.title: Module 6 TITAN Evolution Calibration
experiment_metadata.scenario: Seeded evolutionary calibration comparing TITAN to generic search baselines under a shared synthetic fitness model.

metric_notes.best_fitness: Synthetic objective value under the shared co-evolutionary scoring model.
metric_notes.convergence_gen: Generation index at which the seeded run reaches its best recorded score.

claims_supported: relative TITAN behavior inside the current synthetic search loop
repeatable export of attacker/defender simulation summaries
not_claimed: validated search superiority on operational cyber ranges

summary.recommended_reading: Read the primary metric first, then inspect the raw seed-level rows before making any claims beyond synthetic calibration.

best_fitness.interpretation: Synthetic objective value under the shared co-evolutionary scoring model.

convergence_gen.interpretation: Generation index at which the seeded run reaches its best recorded score.
